entities.name: GENERAL COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The average performance of a parent in a series of hybrids.

entities.name: SPECIFIC COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The deviation of a hybrid's performance from the expected value based on GCA.

entities.name: GENOTYPE-BY-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A high-throughput sequencing method used to determine genetic similarity.

entities.name: HYBRID PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The phenotypic performance of hybrid offspring used for classification.

entities.name: GENETIC SIMILARITY
entities.description: The degree of genetic relatedness between genotypes.

entities.name: GENETIC GAIN
entities.description: The increase in the average performance of a population over time.

entities.name: HYBRID BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs aimed at developing high-yielding hybrid varieties.
